summary: Completed comprehensive testing of P0 features: Admin Dashboard Overdue Section, School/Educator/Growth Partners CRM View/Edit Popups, and Center Dashboard CRM functionality. All 24 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed.
passed_tests: Backend: Admin login authentication
Backend: /api/auth/me returns user info
Backend: /api/dashboard/stats returns overdue_students, overdue_schools, overdue_educators, total_overdue
Backend: Overdue students structure validation
Backend: Overdue schools structure validation
Backend: GET /api/schools/inquiries returns school leads
Backend: PATCH /api/schools/inquiry/{id} - inline edit (name, contact, phone, email, notes)
Backend: POST /api/schools/comment/{id} - add comment
Backend: GET /api/schools/comments/{id} - get comments
Backend: GET /api/educators/applications returns educator applications
Backend: PATCH /api/educators/application/{id} - inline edit (name, phone, email, notes)
Backend: POST /api/educators/comment/{id} - add comment
Backend: GET /api/growth-partners returns growth partners
Backend: PATCH /api/growth-partners/{id} - inline edit (name, phone, email, city, details, notes)
Backend: POST /api/growth_partners/comment/{id} - add comment
Backend: Center user login (andheri@oll.co)
Backend: GET /api/center/demos returns center-specific leads
Backend: POST /api/center/demos - add demo from center
Backend: PATCH /api/center/demos/{id} - update demo
Backend: POST /api/center/demos/{id}/comment - add comment
Backend: GET /api/students/inquiries (regression)
Backend: PATCH /api/students/inquiry/{id} (regression)
Backend: POST /api/students/comment/{id} (regression)
Frontend: Admin Dashboard shows Overdue section with 12 overdue items
Frontend: Overdue section shows Student Demos category with dates
Frontend: School CRM View button opens modal with Edit button
Frontend: School CRM modal has Comments section with add comment input
Frontend: School CRM Edit mode shows Save Changes button
Frontend: Educators CRM View button opens modal with Edit button
Frontend: Educators CRM modal has Comments section
Frontend: Growth Partners View Details opens modal with Edit button
Frontend: Growth Partners modal has Comments section
Frontend: Center Dashboard login works (andheri@oll.co)
Frontend: Center Dashboard shows Add Demo button
Frontend: Center Dashboard Add Demo modal has name/phone fields
Frontend: Center Dashboard View button opens modal with Edit button
Frontend: Center Dashboard modal has Comments section
Frontend: Center Dashboard shows status sections (New Leads, Demo Completed, Converted, Archived)
seed_data_creation: Created test data via API tests (prefixed with TEST_): TEST_School_ViewEdit, TEST_Educator_ViewEdit, TEST_Partner_ViewEdit, TEST_Student_Regression, TEST_Center_Demo, TEST_Center_Update, TEST_Center_Comment
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 features verified working: 1) Admin Dashboard Overdue Section shows overdue_students, overdue_schools, overdue_educators with total count and 'Requires Attention' badge. 2) School CRM, Educators CRM, Growth Partners CRM all have View button that opens modal with Edit button (inline editing) and Comments section. 3) Center Dashboard (andheri@oll.co) shows full Student CRM with Add Demo button, View/Edit modal, Comments section, and status management. Student CRM edit functionality regression passed.

mocked_apis_list: OTP verification - uses 1111 as test OTP (not real SMS/WhatsApp)

P0_Admin_Dashboard_Overdue.details: Dashboard shows Overdue (12) section with Student Demos, School Meetings, Educator Demos categories. Each item shows name, phone, date, and skill.

P0_School_CRM_ViewEdit.details: View button opens modal with Edit button. Edit mode allows inline editing of school_name, contact_name, phone, email, meeting_date, meeting_time, notes. Comments section with add comment functionality.

P0_Educators_CRM_ViewEdit.details: View button opens modal with Edit button. Edit mode allows inline editing of name, phone, email, demo_date, demo_time, notes. Comments section with add comment functionality.

P0_Growth_Partners_ViewEdit.details: View Details button opens modal with Edit button. Edit mode allows inline editing of name, phone, email, city, details, notes. Comments section with add comment functionality.

P0_Center_Dashboard.details: Center login (andheri@oll.co) redirects to /center. Shows full Student CRM with Add Demo button, View/Edit modal, Comments section, status sections (New Leads, Demo Completed, Converted, Archived), and center-specific leads.

Regression_Student_CRM_Edit.details: Student CRM edit functionality still works - PATCH /api/students/inquiry/{id} and POST /api/students/comment/{id} both functional.
